case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. DOROTHY ALIRES et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $12.32 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ALIRES, DOROTHY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIRES, DOROTHY $3,798.00 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,085.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,157.82 AS TO DEFENDANT ALIRES, DOROTHY
